query:
SELECT sceneId, COUNT(*) as attempts, MAX(createdAt) as lastAttempt, 
       GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT status ORDER BY createdAt DESC SEPARATOR ', ') as statuses
FROM providerJobLogs
WHERE sceneId IN (540002, 540003, 540004, 540005, 540006, 540007, 540008, 540009)
GROUP BY sceneId
ORDER BY sceneId;
